summary: The implementation successfully addresses all 9 requirements. The React + TypeScript application with Tailwind CSS includes all requested sections: hero with cultural background and gradient overlay, ticket booking CTA, festival highlights with 8 event cards, experience zones with 6 interactive tiles, schedule with filtering, dual participation/newsletter forms, closing section with partner logos and footer. The heritage-inspired design system uses the specified color palette (saffron, maroon, ivory, gold, forest green), typography (Playfair Display for headings, Lato for body), and classical Indian motifs. All sections are full-width and mobile-responsive.

hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists 'Backend functionality for form submissions' and 'Database storage for participant or newsletter data' as non-goals, yet a backend canister file was created

No authentication or identity management was requested in the BuildRequest. The hooks for Internet Identity (useInternetIdentity, useActor) and associated authentication logic were not part of any requirement

hallucinated_features.description: QueryClient and React Query setup for backend operations
hallucinated_features.reason: While React Query setup itself is reasonable for a React app, it appears to be configured for backend data operations when the BuildRequest explicitly states all content should be static and client-side rendered
The footer includes attribution text and links to 'Caffeine' which was not mentioned anywhere in the BuildRequest requirements or constraints
